rows.name: approval_status_rejected
rows.errorMessage: one-page runbook candidate must stay not_approved

rows.name: learner_facing_release_rejected
rows.errorMessage: one-page runbook candidate cannot be learner-facing release

rows.name: production_ready_rejected
rows.errorMessage: one-page runbook candidate must keep productionReady false

rows.name: trading_signal_text_rejected
rows.errorMessage: runbook text contains trading, broker, automation, performance, or real-money wording

rows.name: commercial_ready_text_rejected
rows.errorMessage: runbook text contains approval, release, commercial-ready, launch, or production wording

rows.name: missing_dry_run_bundle_audit_step_rejected
rows.errorMessage: runbook must include dry-run bundle audit step; runbook must include dry-run bundle audit command

rows.name: missing_dry_run_bundle_audit_command_rejected
rows.errorMessage: runbook must include dry-run bundle audit command

boundary: These negative cases only guard against one-page runbook misuse. They do not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, grant internal-trial readiness, or make the product production-ready.
